children.text:
Let's start your
training with a
Fit Test

These 3 games will calculate
your baseline.
Come back once you’ve played 5 games (one in each Brain Area) to get your overall Lumosity Performance Index (LPI).

Lumosity Performance Index (LPI) is a standardized scale calculated from all your game scores. LPI helps you compare your strengths and weaknesses across games that challenge different cognitive abilities.
